title: BBL Invisible Lights
description: Adds a couple of items that provide light without needing torches
body:
# __**Invisible Lights**__

## __**Overview**__

BBL Invisible Lights add a few new items that allow you to place invisible light source blocks in your minecraft world! These item can be crafted and allows the placement of Invisible lights. The light level of the placed lights can be adjusted by holding shift and using the scroll wheel. When holding the light item will show the light location and there light level in the world, see the media images for more

## __**Support**__

Join the BBL [Discord](https://discord.gg/benbenlaw) for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/benbenlaw) to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
